metadata.description: Clean code principles for any Java project (Spring Boot, Quarkus, plain Java) — a top-20 checklist plus 12 topic references, installable as a Claude Code skill.

plugins.name: java-clean-code
plugins.description: Clean code principles for any Java project. Covers naming, functions, SOLID, TDD, concurrency, clean architecture, and craftsmanship. Examples in Spring Boot, plain Java, and pure domain logic.
